title: Maropost Integration (similar to MailChimp?)
excerpt:

posts.author: Kimberly (Kimberly)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see that you can integrate Monday.com with MailChimp. Would it be possible to add other ESPs, specifically Maropost?

My team works on a series of email campaigns, and it would be really useful to be able to manage everything on a single platform. I’m envisioning them having the ability to start/pause recurring campaigns, and adjust tags, etc, right from Monday. It’d be a great way to cut down on human error!

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Het @Kimberly - welcome to the monday.com community an extension of the monday.com family!

For native support of other platforms you can share the platform and workflow so we can add it to the list for native support at end of the list of integration options:

In the meanwhile, you can create your own integrations by using our API. Learn more about it here:

Support

Does monday.com have an API?

7 min read Feature   We most certainly do! Our API is built on GraphQL and will give you a ton of flexibility for accessing and changing information in your monday.com account.   Why GraphQL...
